confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify · Private data: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results, discovery_account, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method, discovery_purchase_credits, discovery_subscribe · Public sink: discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method · Destructive: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify · Private data: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results, discovery_account, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method, discovery_purchase_credits, discovery_subscribe · Public sink: discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_signup, discovery_signup_verify, discovery_login, discovery_login_verify, discovery_add_payment_method · Destructive: discovery_estimate, discovery_upload, discovery_analyze, discovery_status, discovery_get_results

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
